rationale: Section 26.075 governs petition elections to reduce tax rates for non-school-district taxing units and expressly excludes school districts. The proposed homestead exemption increase under §11.13(b) does not interact with this section's operative provisions.
quote:
(a) This section applies only to a taxing unit other than:
(1) a special taxing unit;
(2) a school district; or
(3) a municipality with a population of 30,000 or more.
_note: No conflict identified. §26.075 addresses tax-rate reduction petition elections for non-school taxing units; the proposed §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase is unrelated to this mechanism.
